summary:
Training completed in 42.2 hours (72 epochs).
Best performance achieved at epoch 71.

Key Metrics:
- mAP@50: 0.8774 (mean average precision at 50% IoU)
- mAP@50-95: 0.5573 (mAP across all IoU thresholds)
- Precision: 0.8717 (accuracy of positive predictions)
- Recall: 0.8060 (completeness of detections)

Final Loss: 1.2017
strengths: ✅ Excellent precision: mAP@50-95 = 0.5573 indicates strong overall detection accuracy
✅ High recall: 0.8060 - model captures most objects in images
✅ High precision: 0.8717 - low false positive rate
recommendations: ✨ Model shows good fit! Monitor validation metrics in future runs.
